title: aristida hystricula
intro: Aristida hystricula, also known as the thorn grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with Aristida hystricula include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections due to its antimicrobial properties. Aristida hystricula is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
